identity: Human male druid, earthy weathered face, long braided brown hair with small leaves woven in, soft green eyes, tan skin, medium build.
outfit: Green-and-brown leaf-pattern robes with a mantle of living bark across the shoulders, antler headdress rising from the crown, ivy wrapping the forearms, rope belt with pouches of herbs. Barefoot.
weapons: A gnarled wooden staff topped with a living green leaf cluster, held in the right hand.
attackStyle: East-facing. Staff thrust forward, a swirl of green leaves and thorny vines erupting outward.
spellStyle: East-facing. Staff planted, free hand raised with a small glowing golden acorn floating above the palm, leaves swirling.
blockStyle: East-facing. Staff held diagonally, a translucent barrier of interwoven green vines forming in front.
koStyle: East-facing, slumped on one knee, staff fallen beside him, antler headdress tipped forward.
southStyle: Facing camera (south), serene nature idle. Staff planted at his side, free hand holding a small green sprout. Antlers above the head.
portraitStyle: Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Antler headdress, leaves in hair, bark mantle on shoulders, green robes.

referenceSheet.prompt:
IDENTITY (this image becomes the canonical identity anchor — preserve in every downstream frame): Human male druid, earthy weathered face, long braided brown hair with small leaves woven in, soft green eyes, tan skin, medium build.

OUTFIT: Green-and-brown leaf-pattern robes with a mantle of living bark across the shoulders, antler headdress rising from the crown, ivy wrapping the forearms, rope belt with pouches of herbs. Barefoot.

WEAPONS: A gnarled wooden staff topped with a living green leaf cluster, held in the right hand.

CLASS: humanoid. Full-body view, head to feet visible. Character occupies ~70% of the canvas height. Feet aligned near the bottom; headroom above.

POSE: full-body side profile facing right (east), calm combat-ready idle. Head up, eyes visible. NOT a portrait bust, NOT a close-up — entire character from head to feet.

STYLE: detailed pixel art with clean readable silhouette, warm pixel-art palette, transparent background, no ground shadow.

portrait.prompt:
IDENTITY (must match reference sheet exactly): Human male druid, earthy weathered face, long braided brown hair with small leaves woven in, soft green eyes, tan skin, medium build.

OUTFIT: Green-and-brown leaf-pattern robes with a mantle of living bark across the shoulders, antler headdress rising from the crown, ivy wrapping the forearms, rope belt with pouches of herbs. Barefoot.

WEAPONS: A gnarled wooden staff topped with a living green leaf cluster, held in the right hand.

POSE (portrait): Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Antler headdress, leaves in hair, bark mantle on shoulders, green robes.

FRAMING: bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view, centered in a 256x256 canvas, shoulders fill the lower third.

SCALE (non-negotiable): character must occupy approximately 180px of the 256px canvas height — roughly 70%. Do NOT stretch or upscale. Extra space above head and/or below feet is correct.

STYLE: pixel art, transparent background, no ground shadow, no borders, no text. Match the palette and style of the reference sheet.

NEGATIVE: do not add weapons or props not listed in WEAPONS. Do not change palette, species, or outfit from the reference sheet. Do not zoom in — respect SCALE.
